title: Digital Payments Awareness Week 2026 - Launch of ‘Awareness Program on Digital Payments’ and Interaction with Payment Systems Operators (PSOs)
description: The sixth edition of Digital Payments Awareness Week (DPAW) is being observed during March 9-13, 2026. As part of this initiative, Governor Shri Sanjay Malhotra today launched the pilot program titled 'Awareness Program on Digital Payments'. The pilot will be conducted in Maharashtra in partnership with CSC e-Governance Services India Limited. The pilot will include conduct of in-person awareness programs for 10 lakh participants in rural and semi urban areas through Village Level Entrepreneurs
